note: Tighten the in-flight UTXO reservation window in the web wallet. Previously the wallet only reserved selectedUtxos AFTER sendrawtransaction returned OK, which left a small race: a real double-click (or two parallel async builds in quick succession) could both reach buildAndSignTx with the same utxos pool before either reserved anything. The reservation now runs immediately AFTER the user confirms the dialog and BEFORE the sendrawtransaction RPC. If the broadcast fails (network / node reject), _inflightRelease frees the UTXOs immediately so the user retries with no 60 s wait. If it succeeds, the same UTXOs are re-recorded with the broadcast txid for cross-reconcile. Same pattern in sendTransactionMany. Belt-and-braces: a window._sendInProgress flag guards re-entrancy from the outermost layer (a wrapped try/finally releases it on every exit path, including early returns before the inner try opens). Also fixed a side cosmetic bug — the post-broadcast change figure now uses selectedUtxos.reduce, not the full UTXO pool, so the displayed change matches what the tx actually returned. NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO node, NO miner. Pure wallet-side.
